title: Minecraft Stop Motion
description: Provides a simple utility that makes stop motion animation much easier.
body:
## Minecraft Stop Motion
This mod provides special keybindings and a couple of commands that will make stop motion animation a breeze.
- To begin you will need to set the first and second position at each corner.
- Next you need to use /mcsm structure save "NAME"
- Afterwards you will need to select the structure by using /mcsm structure select "NAME"
- Then you can use the Move keys to shift the entire structure Up, Down, North, East, South, West.
- Before using the cameras you will need to set their positions, you have 9 camera "slots" available.
